title: LunaStellar
description: A mod that lets you harness the power of Stars!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/R9QiulXFGtg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This mod uses Amethyst in a way to make your experience in Minecraft more Dynamic by adding celestial weapons and tools!

**How to start!**

1.   Find an Amethyst Geode
2.   Mine the clusters and follow the recipes!

![Crystal Campfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95daf2945cff2f05b2544f0effd0956306a87a3b.png)![Star Faller explosion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3643ba0533ee476b5d10fc94e367b79e06f1126.png)![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e98b1c77402028eeb55563fdfc37d055ba203486.png)![End Explosion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc035c4e459fd9a1a102e70d7cba5d666ad2af53.png)![Celestial Bell Shooting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a51e9b8c614bccb968c08647123b234b6d693e73.png)
